build.buildCommand: npx prisma generate && npx vitest run tests/unit --reporter=json --outputFile=tests/results.json && node tests/generate-report.js

deploy.startCommand: npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && node prisma/seed-homolog.js && node src/server.jsnpx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && node prisma/seed-homolog.js && node src/server.js
